The message body is an informal, self-referential question about whether the recipient is receiving the message and how it appears.

questions: Who or what is the intended recipient of this message?

novelty: The content is unusually meta-communicative for a noticeboard item, treating the channel itself as the subject rather than a code or design artifact.
